blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Real-wallet connection requires headed browser with wallet extension — headless Chromium cannot interact with MetaMask or equivalent extensions
Real-wallet auth and reload verification requires headed browser with wallet extension — same blocker as VAL-AUTH-003

override.reason: Deferred because the current validator environment is headless Chromium without a real wallet extension. These wallet-persistence assertions require headed/manual validation with an actual wallet connection and will be revalidated in the end-to-end milestone.

executionNotes: Override applied: VAL-AUTH-003 and VAL-AUTH-004 were deferred to m6-first-run-and-agent-consistency-flows for later headed/manual validation with a real wallet.
